description: Canonical fixture scenarios for the blocked_auth_failure rescue class. Each entry shapes a real-world auth-failure pattern observed in boss_metrics.jsonl rows or dispatch preflight checks, paired with the expected terminal-class classification and the operator-actionable remediation. Tests at tests/benchmarks/test_auth_failure_scenarios.py confirm each shape maps to the existing TerminalClass.BLOCKED_AUTH_FAILURE via aragora.swarm.terminal_truth.classify_from_metrics or classify_preflight_failure without spawning real agents.
source_evidence: boss_metrics.jsonl rows where worker_outcome contains 'auth' substring (~25% of B0 ticks)
preflight check failures matching _PREFLIGHT_AUTH_HINTS in aragora/swarm/terminal_truth.py
rescue ledger entries flagged under terminal_classes=['blocked_auth_failure'] in docs/benchmarks/corpus.json

scenarios.name: gh CLI not authenticated (login expired)

checks.name: gh_auth
checks.detail: gh: not logged in — run gh auth login

scenarios.remediation: Run `gh auth login` or refresh `GH_TOKEN` env var; ensure the boss-loop launchd inherits the rotated token via `launchctl bootout && launchctl bootstrap`.

scenarios.name: GitHub API HTTP 401 — token expired or invalid
scenarios.remediation: Rotate the GitHub App installation token (or rotate `ARAGORA_BOSS_LOOP_GH_TOKEN`); reload any launchd-managed services that inherit the env.

scenarios.name: GitHub API HTTP 403 — token scope insufficient or rate-limited
scenarios.remediation: Verify token scopes include `repo` and `workflow`; if rate-limited, wait or switch to a GitHub App installation token with separate rate-limit budget.

scenarios.name: Permission denied on git push (branch protection or auth misconfig)

checks.name: git_push_probe
checks.detail: Permission denied (publickey). Could not push to refs/heads/feature-x.

scenarios.remediation: Confirm SSH key is loaded (`ssh-add -l`) or HTTPS credentials are valid; for protected branches, verify the push targets a non-protected branch first.

scenarios.name: Worker run terminated with auth-related outcome (metrics row classifier path)
scenarios.remediation: Same as auth-002; worker exit-code 'auth_token_expired' or any other outcome substring matching `auth` is routed to BLOCKED_AUTH_FAILURE by aragora.swarm.terminal_truth.classify_from_metrics line 132-133.
